title: nullptr SIGSEGV when verilating cva6
body:
I got a SIGSEGV when verilating CVA6 with verilator master (8157f21c3e6214887bffdc758da2a8d51225364d), there are similar errors with a few random 5.x releases i had laying around.

The backtrace I get look like this:

```
Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >::basic_string (this=0x7fffffffc060, 
    __str=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0xa8>) at /usr/include/c++/14/bits/basic_string.h:556
556		_M_construct(__str._M_data(), __str._M_data() + __str.length(),
#0  std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >::basic_string (this=0x7fffffffc060, __str=<error reading variable: Cannot access memory at address 0xa8>) at /usr/include/c++/14/bits/basic_string.h:556
#1  0x0000000000521595 in AstVar::name[abi:cxx11]() const (this=0x0) at ../V3AstNodeOther.h:1979
#2  AstVar::sameNode (this=0x0, samep=<optimized out>) at ../V3AstNodes.cpp:2605
#3  0x0000000000521a61 in AstMemberSel::sameNode (this=0xe8407d0, samep=<optimized out>) at ../V3AstNodes.cpp:1999
#4  0x00000000005101b9 in AstNode::sameTreeIter (node1p=0xe8407d0, node2p=0x1019a2d0, ignNext=ignNext@entry=false, gateOnly=gateOnly@entry=false) at ../V3Ast.cpp:1115
```

The `Cannot access memory at address 0xa8` smell like a `nullptr` problem. Notice `(this=0x0)` in
`AstVar::name()`. The `name()` is invoked from `V3AstNodes.cpp:1999`:

```
bool AstMemberSel::sameNode(const AstNode* samep) const {
    const AstMemberSel* const sp = VN_DBG_AS(samep, MemberSel);
    return sp != nullptr && access() == sp->access() && fromp()->isSame(sp->fromp())
           && name() == sp->name() && varp()->sameNode(sp->varp());
}
```

Judging by how `varp()` is used it seems that `nullptr` is a valid condition. So reflectively 
i added a guard to the recursive call:

```
diff --git a/src/V3AstNodes.cpp b/src/V3AstNodes.cpp
index 05f0d16dd..58578272c 100644
--- a/src/V3AstNodes.cpp
+++ b/src/V3AstNodes.cpp
@@ -1996,7 +1996,7 @@ AstMemberSel::AstMemberSel(FileLine* fl, AstNodeExpr* fromp, AstVar* varp)
 bool AstMemberSel::sameNode(const AstNode* samep) const {
     const AstMemberSel* const sp = VN_DBG_AS(samep, MemberSel);
     return sp != nullptr && access() == sp->access() && fromp()->isSame(sp->fromp())
-           && name() == sp->name() && varp()->sameNode(sp->varp());
+           && name() == sp->name() && varp() != nullptr && varp()->sameNode(sp->varp());
 }
 
 void AstMemberSel::dump(std::ostream& str) const {
```

With this fix, the verilator *still* tests pass:

```
make tests
[...]
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/kp/Projects/verilator/examples/make_tracing_sc'
Tests passed!

Now type 'make install' to install.
Or type 'make' inside an examples subdirectory.
```


... and I can compile CVA6 and the compiled model work as expected:

```
*** [rvfi_tracer] +timeout :   30000000 cycles
[Varilator] Boot address: 0x80000000
[Verilator] Preload image to address 0x80000000, len 0x1f0
0: Hello World !
*** [rvfi_tracer] INFO: Simulation terminated after 4120 cycles, tohost value 1!

testbench/tests/hello_world/hello_world.elf *** SUCCESS *** (tohost = 0) after 4132 cycles
CPU time used: 7818.83 ms
Wall clock time passed: 7851.96 ms
```
